basic_details.job_title: ICGEB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB)
basic_details.short_information: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Life Sciences with NET/GATE qualification
qualification.details: Master's degree in Life Sciences with NET/GATE qualification and minimum 2 years of research experience in molecular biology, protein biochemistry, or immunology.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICGEB Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Master's degree in Life Sciences with NET/GATE qualification and minimum 2 years of research experience in molecular biology, protein biochemistry, or immunology.

ICGEB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICGEB Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Life Sciences along with a valid NET/GATE qualification to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Research Fellow post announced by ICGEB in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the ICGEB Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Research Fellow position will be as per the guidelines set by the Department of Science and Technology (DST).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The primary selection process involves an application review. Shortlisted candidates may be called for further assessment.

faq.question: Q8. Does ICGEB offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Senior Research Fellow position is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
